categories.label: Controlled Sectors
categories.description: VP from all controlled hex tiles (1-4 VP each depending on location)

categories.label: Reputation Tiles
categories.description: VP from reputation tiles earned by winning combat (1-4 VP each)

categories.label: Ambassador Tiles
categories.description: 1 VP per ambassador tile from active diplomatic agreements

categories.label: Technology Tracks
categories.description: VP earned from progress along the three technology tracks

categories.label: Discovery Tiles
categories.description: VP from discovery tiles with end-game scoring value

categories.label: Traitor Card Penalty
categories.description: -2 VP if holding the Traitor card at game end (0 or 1)

categories.label: Species Bonus
categories.description: VP from faction-specific scoring conditions, if any

win_condition: Player with the most total VP after 9 rounds wins
